code:
sequenceDiagram participant VThread_A as "Thread Executora da Tarefa
(FinTech_PaymentGateway)" participant TaskExecutorService as "TaskExecutorService" participant EventPublisher as "EventPublisher" participant SharedExecutor as "Executor Partilhado
(FinTech_LedgerService)" VThread_A ->>+ TaskExecutorService: executeSynchronousBlock(FinTech_TransactionQueue) loop "Ciclo de Execução Síncrona" Note over TaskExecutorService: Executa a lógica do Nó N... TaskExecutorService ->> TaskExecutorService: Acumula Evento (FinTech_FraudDetection) end Note right of TaskExecutorService: O ciclo termina ao encontrar um ponto de commit. TaskExecutorService ->>+ EventPublisher: publishEvents(FinTech_AuthVault) Note right of EventPublisher: A thread principal NÃO espera. par "Notificação Assíncrona dos Listeners com Lote de Eventos" EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(FinTech_TransactionQueue)) and EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(FinTech_FraudDetection)) end EventPublisher -->>- TaskExecutorService: Retorna Imediatamente TaskExecutorService -->>- VThread_A: Retorna VThread_A ->> VThread_A: Continua para o próximo passo (FinTech_PaymentGateway) Note over SharedExecutor: Os listeners agora podem otimizar o seu trabalho
(FinTech_FraudDetection).

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个序列图，展示支付网关中同步执行块和事件发布的完整流程。核心场景是：VThread_A作为任务执行线程，调用TaskExecutorService执行同步逻辑，然后异步通知多个监听器。
明白了。VThread_A是PaymentGateway的线程，它调用TaskExecutorService的executeSynchronousBlock方法，参数是TransactionQueue对吗？然后TaskExecutorService内部有个循环处理节点逻辑？
对的。循环里TaskExecutorService会累积FraudDetection相关的事件。循环结束条件是遇到commit点。这个循环需要标注为"Ciclo de Execução Síncrona"。
好的，我添加了循环结构和内部自调用。循环结束后，TaskExecutorService调用EventPublisher的publishEvents方法，参数是AuthVault？
是的。关键点：EventPublisher发布事件时，主线程不会等待。这里要用par结构表示两个并发的submit调用，都提交到SharedExecutor——也就是LedgerService的共享执行器。
确认一下par分支：一个是submit(TransactionQueue)，另一个是submit(FraudDetection)？然后EventPublisher虚线返回给TaskExecutorService，再返回到VThread_A？
没错，都是立即返回。VThread_A返回后继续执行PaymentGateway的下一步。最后需要在SharedExecutor上加个注释，说明监听器现在可以优化FraudDetection的工作。
画好了。我检查一下：VThread_A标注为"Thread Executora da Tarefa (FinTech_PaymentGateway)"，SharedExecutor标注为"Executor Partilhado (FinTech_LedgerService)"，对吗？
SharedExecutor的标注没问题，但VThread_A的别名写完整些："Thread Executora da Tarefa<br(FinTech_PaymentGateway)"，注意有个换行。另外TaskExecutorService右侧需要加注释说明循环结束条件。
已修正VThread_A的别名格式，添加了TaskExecutorService右侧的注释"O ciclo termina ao encontrar um ponto de commit."，还有EventPublisher右侧的注释"A thread principal NÃO espera."。
循环内部的注释"Executa a lógica do Nó N..."放在Note over TaskExecutorService，这个也有了是吧？最后SharedExecutor的注释用"Os listeners agora podem otimizar o seu trabalho (FinTech_FraudDetection)."
全部确认完成。图中包含：四个参与者、同步调用循环、事件累积、异步并行提交、立即返回链，以及三处注释。par块标注为"Notificação Assíncrona dos Listeners com Lote de Eventos"。结构完整。
